name: Vegan: Aegean Artichoke & Penne Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Fresh basil or 1 teaspoon Dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stems off the artichokes. Peel away the tough outer leaves to reveal yellow-green hearts. Cut the artichokes into quarters.
2. In a medium bowl, combine 1/4 cup lemon juice with 2 cups water. Add the artichokes and toss gently to prevent discoloration. Drain well. Steam the artichokes until tender, about 20 minutes. Let cool.
3. Bring 2 quarts water to a rapid boil in a large pot. Add 1 teaspoon salt and penne. Cook the penne until al dente, about 10 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water.
4. To make the salad dressing, combine tomato juice, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, parsley, basil, salt, and pepper in a food processor or blender. Puree for 30 seconds.
5. Toss together artichokes, penne, capers, olives, and feta cheese in a large bowl. Pour the dressing over and toss well. Serve and enjoy.
